judge_reason: Description A mentions only a 'COPY' stamp, while Description B describes multiple distinct stamps ('COPY' in a border, 'RESTRICTED' stamps) and a handwritten annotation, indicating different visual content.
original_image_tags: Large faded stamp in upper left corner reading "COPY".
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: A scanned typewritten military memorandum page with the stamped words “COPY” and “RESTRICTED,” headed “Department of the Air Force, Headquarters United States Air Force, Washington,” dated 6 February 1948, with a large handwritten “Personnel” notation and an additional handwritten note/signature across the upper right.*
